titleStmt.title: SII 28.264: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 264. (A.R. No. 418 of 1913.) ĀṞAGAḶŪR, ATTUR TALUK, SALEM DISTRICT.

summary.p: Kāmēśvara temple, maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine, south wall.

p.hi: Tribhuvanachakravartti Kulōttuṅga (III) Year 29, Kanyā, śu. 2, Wednesday, Hastam = 1206 A.D., September 6, The Hasta nakshatram ended at .62 on the previous day.
p.note: On September 3, 1209 A.D. śu. 2 was f.d.t. ·15 and Hastam was current till ·64 of September 3.

summary.p: Records that Chiṟuttoṇḍaṉ, a tycoon (chelvan) of Āṟagaḷūr set up the three emperumakkaḷ (Appar, Jñānasambandar and Sundarar-the the three foremost nāyanārs) in the temple of Tirukkāmīśvaram-uḍaiya-nāyaṉār, the God of Āṟagaḷūr, in Āṟṟūr-kūṟṟam in Milāḍu alias Jaṉanātha-vaḷanāḍu and endowed 5000 aṉṟāḍu-naṟkāśu for their daily worship starting with bathing in the river, two evening twilight lamps, clothes for draping the images, food offerings with 4 nāḻi of rice and accompanying dishes. The māhēśvara-kkaṇkāṇi, dēvarkaṉmi and the accountant of the temple were entrusted with the amount on the date quoted. The same donor endowed three plates weigning 48 palam, a cross-legged stand weighing 70 palam and probably a dharā lamp.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīkulottuṅkacoḻa tevaṟku yāṇṭu Irupattoṉpatā
vatu milāṭākiya caṉanātavaḷanāṭṭu Āṟṟūṟ kūṟṟattāṟakaḷūril Uṭaiyār tirukkāmīśvaramu
ṭaiya nāyaṉār koyilil Emperumakkaḷ mūvaraiyum Eḻuntaruḷuvitta meṟpaṭiyūril Irukku
ñ celvaṉāṉa ciṟuttoṇṭaṉeṉ Emperumakkaḷukkuc cantirāttavar pūcai ceyyum
paṭi nāḷ Oṉṟukku Āṟṟil tirumañcaṇan tūṇippatakkum Antic canti viḷakku Ira
ṇṭuñ cāttiyaruḷa paricaṭṭamun tiruppaḷḷittāmamun tiruamutukku Arici nānāḻiyuṅ
kaṟiyamutu nāṟpalamu Itukkut takka Uppu miḷaku neyyamutuñ ceyvatāka Iṉṉāya
nār śrīpaṇṭārattu śrīmāheśvarak kaṅkāṇi ceyvārkaḷun tevarkaṉmi ko
yiṟ kaṇakkaṉum muṉṉilaiyāka Ivvāṇṭaik kaṉṉi nāyaṟṟup pūrvva pakṣa
ttu dvitiyaiyum putaṉ kiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Attatti nāḷ Oṭukkiṉa Aṉṟāṭu naṟkācu
5 1000 Ikkācu Aiyyāyiramum śrīpaṇṭārattu Oṭukki Ippaṭi cantirātittavarai
pūcai celuttak kaṭavatāṉamaikku Itu paṉmāheśvarar Irakṣai Itu Aḻivu ce
yvāṉ keṅkaiyiṭai kumariyiṭai ceytār ceyta pāvaṅkoḷvāṉ śiva
mastu§ Ivaṉ Emperumakkaḷukku Iṭṭa parikala muṉṟināl Eṭai 4 10 8lam tiruvaṭṭaṇaikkāloṉṟināl Eṭai
7 10lam
tarāContinuation lost.
Digital edition of SII 28.264 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
